display.purpose: Page-scale statements only. Keep out of compact cards and sidebars.

title.purpose: Game names, compact panel headers, and card labels.

body.purpose: Short descriptions and support copy with 65 to 75ch line length.

label.purpose: Buttons, chips, badges, filters, metadata, and rail navigation.

shadows.name: low-surface
shadows.purpose: Rails, cards, info panels, and quiet containers.

shadows.name: tight-hover
shadows.purpose: Game card hover and compact lift.

shadows.name: coral-action-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary buttons and the logo mark.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Buttons, chips, cards, and compact hover states.

motion.name: hover-lift
motion.purpose: Small confidence feedback without moving layout.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Transitions collapse to 0.01ms and hover transforms are disabled.

breakpoints.name: desktop-collapse
breakpoints.purpose: Side rail and multi-column page layouts collapse.

breakpoints.name: mobile-nav
breakpoints.purpose: Header navigation becomes mobile menu and dense grids adjust.

breakpoints.name: small-phone
breakpoints.purpose: Home discovery panel and game grids compress for small devices.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button for search, browse, and play actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 44px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; padding: 11px 18px; color: #ffffff; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F05A3F, #e9442b); font: 800 1rem -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 6px 12px rgba(240, 90, 63, 0.22); transition: transform 160ms ease, box-shadow 160ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(240, 90, 63, 0.26); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(240, 90, 63, 0.22); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary catalog actions such as View all or More category games.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 40px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid #ffc5b8; border-radius: 999px; padding: 9px 14px; color: #B92E1E; background: #FFF0EB; text-decoration: none; font: 800 0.95rem -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { color: #B92E1E; background: #fff8f5; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(240, 90, 63, 0.22); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Primary game search field in header and homepage discovery panel.
components.html: <input class="ds-search-input" type="search" placeholder="Search Donuteria, Parkour, Racing...">
components.css: .ds-search-input { width: 100%; min-height: 48px; border: 1px solid #C4D2E6; border-radius: 12px; color: #172033; background: #ffffff; padding: 0 16px; font: 400 1rem -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-search-input::placeholder { color: #61708a; } .ds-search-input:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(240, 90, 63, 0.22); }

components.name: Intent Chip
components.description: Compact category and intent entry point on the homepage.
components.css: .ds-intent-chip { min-height: 40px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; flex: 0 0 auto; padding: 8px 13px; border: 1px solid #DBE5F5; border-radius: 999px; color: #172033; background: #FFF0EB; text-decoration: none; font: 850 0.92rem -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-intent-chip:hover { border-color: #ffc5b8; color: #B92E1E; } .ds-intent-chip:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(240, 90, 63, 0.22); }

components.name: Game Card
components.description: Thumbnail-led game card for catalog and recommendation grids.
components.html:
NEW
Smash Karts
components.css: .ds-game-card { position: relative; display: block; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgba(196, 210, 230, 0.92); border-radius: 16px; color: inherit; background: #ffffff; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 160ms ease, box-shadow 160ms ease, border-color 160ms ease; } .ds-game-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: #ffc5b8; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(23, 32, 51, 0.1); } .ds-game-card:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(240, 90, 63, 0.22); } .ds-game-thumb { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 16 / 10; display: grid; place-items: center; overflow: hidden; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFF8D9, #FFF0EB 52%, #EAF6FF); } .ds-game-info { position: absolute; inset: auto 0 0; padding: 28px 8px 8px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(13, 21, 36, 0.82)); text-align: center; } .ds-game-info strong { color: #ffffff; font: 850 0.82rem/1.18 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; text-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .ds-badge { position: absolute; top: 8px; right: 8px; z-index: 1; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 999px; color: #ffffff; background: #1F9D62; font: 850 0.72rem -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Side Rail Nav
components.description: Desktop homepage and catalog navigation rail.
components.html:
Explore

HomeAll gamesNew games
components.css: .ds-rail { width: 200px; display: grid; gap: 4px; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #DBE5F5; border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(23, 32, 51, 0.08); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-rail h2 { margin: 0 0 8px; color: #6D7890; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 850; } .ds-rail a { min-height: 38px; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 8px 10px; border-radius: 12px; color: #4E5C73; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 800; } .ds-rail a:hover, .ds-rail-active { color: #B92E1E !important; background: #FFF0EB; }

narrative.overview: BTW game means "By the way, play a quick game." The visual system is a bright, compact game shelf for casual players, children, and students who need to recognize a fun option fast. The site should feel lively through thumbnails, category color, and quick interactions, not through noisy decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Fast scan density: show games early, with minimal marketing copy.
Playful but controlled: color supports category, state, and action.
Trust before clicks: predictable navigation, visible titles, clear metadata.
Light and safe: no black-first theme, no betting cues, no hostile lobby mood.
Thumbnail-led variety: game art carries most of the visual diversity.

rules.name: The Coral Action Rule
rules.body: Coral owns primary action, active state, logo energy, and focus. Do not let blue become the main CTA color.

rules.name: The Thumbnail Variety Rule
rules.body: When a screen feels flat, increase useful game thumbnails or category tints before adding unrelated decoration.

rules.name: The No Casino Palette Rule
rules.body: Never use red-and-gold urgency, black neon, jackpot shine, or slot-machine color logic.

rules.name: The Compact Surface Rule
rules.body: Cards, sidebars, chips, and toolbars use title or label scale, never hero-scale typography.

rules.name: The Border-First Rule
rules.body: Use a full 1px border plus surface tint for structure. Never use a colored side stripe.

dos: Do keep the homepage as a high-density game shelf with visible games above the fold.
Do preserve the desktop left side rail on home and catalog-like surfaces unless the viewport requires collapse.
Do use the 1360px container when the page needs both navigation and dense game display.
Do let thumbnails carry visual variety before adding decorative backgrounds.
Do use coral for primary actions, focus, and selected states.
Do keep body text on tinted surfaces dark enough for WCAG AA contrast.
Do keep mobile layouts two-column for game grids when titles still fit.
Do support reduced motion. Hover lifts and transitions must have a reduced-motion fallback.
donts: Don't use casino or betting visual language, including dark neon, jackpot cues, slot-machine energy, aggressive red-and-gold urgency, and misleading reward patterns.
Don't use overly childish preschool styling, toy-like clutter, or mascot-heavy UI.
Don't use dark esports aesthetics, heavy black backgrounds, smoky gradients, or hostile shooter-lobby tone.
Don't make blue the main brand or CTA color. Sky Blue is a support color only.
Don't replace game thumbnails with unrelated decoration or empty colored panels when real thumbnails exist.
Don't use gradient text, glass cards as a default, colored side-stripe cards, or repeated tiny uppercase section eyebrows.
Don't nest cards inside cards. Use spacing, dividers, and full-width panels instead.
Don't make homepage hero copy push games far below the fold.
